name: Image Accuracy Benchmark — Rome 110 CE Characters
description: Raw prompts a user might naturally type vs. Triad-enhanced prompts grounded in the cultural guide. Both paths use the character's Supabase reference image (avatar) as the visual anchor via Vertex AI subject reference or Gemini visual analysis. The comparison isolates prompt quality — naive vs Triad-enhanced — not character generation from scratch.

characters.marcus: Senator Marcus Tullius — age 58, senior senator, Stoic, Esquiline Hill villa
characters.gaius: Gaius the Merchant — age 35, freedman, spice and silk trader, Ostia connections
characters.julia: Julia Aurelia — age 22, patrician daughter, educated, Stoic philosophy student

shot_types.portrait: Close bust portrait, face and shoulders, character clearly readable
shot_types.scene: Character in a specific Rome 110 CE location, environment visible
shot_types.action: Character actively doing something characteristic of their role
shot_types.marketing_hero: Cinematic wide shot, dramatic lighting, campaign-quality composition
shot_types.dialogue: Two characters from our trio interacting — tests cross-character social dynamics and class distinctions
shot_types.public_gathering: Character at a Roman civic or social event with period-accurate crowd
shot_types.domestic: Character in private home or workplace with household members or staff
shot_types.transit: Character moving through Rome — street, harbor, or transport scene

prompts.raw_prompt: Portrait of Marcus, an old Roman senator, wearing a white toga, stern face
anachronisms_in_raw: generic toga with no class markers
no period-specific details for a senator of his rank
prompts.enhancement_goal: Add toga praetexta (purple border for senator), age-accurate stern Stoic expression, Esquiline Hill interior setting, warm oil lamp lighting

prompts.raw_prompt: Marcus, a Roman senator, giving a speech in the Colosseum
anachronisms_in_raw: Colosseum is for spectacles not speeches
senators gave speeches in the Curia Julia or from the Rostra in the Forum Romanum
prompts.enhancement_goal: MUST: Marcus standing on a raised stone platform speaking to seated men in white togas inside a rectangular stone hall with high windows — the Roman Senate house. MUST: white toga with a wide purple border stripe. BACKGROUND: marble walls, wooden benches in rows, no columns outside — this is INDOORS in a formal hall, not an arena

prompts.raw_prompt: Marcus, a Roman senator, writing with a pen and paper at his desk
anachronisms_in_raw: paper and modern pen don't exist in 110 CE
should be wax tablet or papyrus scroll with a stylus
prompts.enhancement_goal: MUST: Marcus scratching letters into a small hinged wooden board filled with dark wax using a pointed metal stick — NO pen, NO paper, NO quill. MUST: white toga with purple border stripe. BACKGROUND: small Roman study room with stone walls, a single clay oil lamp with a flickering flame, rolled papyrus scrolls in cubbyholes behind him, wooden writing desk

prompts.raw_prompt: Epic cinematic shot of Marcus, a powerful Roman senator, standing in ancient Rome
anachronisms_in_raw: vague — could render any era
no character-specific grounding or dress markers
prompts.enhancement_goal: MUST: Marcus Tullius standing OUTDOORS in the Forum Romanum — open sky, ancient Roman stone plaza. MUST: white toga with a wide purple border clearly visible. BACKGROUND: weathered stone columns of the Temple of Saturn behind him, golden hour sunlight casting long shadows across Roman marble pavement, dignified Stoic expression

prompts.raw_prompt: Portrait of Gaius, a Roman merchant, friendly face, wearing Roman clothes
anachronisms_in_raw: vague clothing — freedman would NOT wear toga
no class-specific markers for a merchant of his background
prompts.enhancement_goal: MUST: Gaius wearing a plain knee-length linen tunic belted at the waist with a draped wool cloak over one shoulder — NOT a toga, simpler working clothes. MUST: a small round bronze disc on a leather cord around his neck, engraved with a winged staff symbol. Weathered sun-tanned face, warm proud expression of a self-made man. BACKGROUND: wooden market stall with clay jars and rolled fabric behind him

prompts.raw_prompt: Gaius, a Roman merchant, selling goods at an ancient marketplace
anachronisms_in_raw: generic market — should be Forum Boarium or Ostia harbor
goods should be period-specific spices, silk, amphorae
prompts.enhancement_goal: Ostia harbor market, stalls with rolled bolts of colored silk fabric, ceramic spice jars, clay amphorae — painted wooden guild sign with a winged staff symbol above the stall entrance, harbor ships visible in background

prompts.raw_prompt: Gaius, a Roman trader, counting coins and making a deal
anachronisms_in_raw: coins correct but no period detail — should be aureus, denarius, sestertius on a counting board
prompts.enhancement_goal: MUST: Two men gripping each other's RIGHT WRISTS — not shaking hands, but each man grabs the other's forearm just above the wrist, elbows raised at chest height, sealing a deal. MUST: Gaius in a plain linen tunic, the other man in colorful patterned eastern robes. On the table between them: gold and silver coins spread on a flat wooden board. BACKGROUND: harbor dock, wooden ship masts and rope rigging visible behind them

prompts.raw_prompt: Epic shot of Gaius, a successful Roman businessman, in ancient Rome at sunset
anachronisms_in_raw: businessman framing is anachronistic — freedman merchant has specific social position
prompts.enhancement_goal: MUST: Gaius in a plain linen tunic with a draped wool cloak, holding a rolled papyrus scroll, standing OUTDOORS at a harbor dock at sunset. MUST: behind him, workers are lifting large clay jars with two handles out of a wooden ship with a single square sail. BACKGROUND: golden sunset sky over the sea, harbor stone quay, wooden cranes, warm cinematic lighting

prompts.raw_prompt: Portrait of Julia, a beautiful young Roman woman, with flowers in her hair
anachronisms_in_raw: flowers in hair are more Renaissance than Roman
Roman women wore elaborate pinned hairstyles with acus crinales hairpins, not floral wreaths
prompts.enhancement_goal: Julia Aurelia, stola over tunica, palla draped, Roman sella chair, elaborate pinned Trajanic-era coiffure, educated and thoughtful expression

prompts.raw_prompt: Julia, a Roman woman, relaxing in a beautiful garden reading a book
anachronisms_in_raw: codex book form was emerging but scroll (volumen) was dominant in 110 CE
garden should be peristyle style with impluvium
prompts.enhancement_goal: Julia in peristyle garden of patrician domus, reading a papyrus scroll (volumen), wax tablet beside her for notes, columned garden with impluvium visible

prompts.raw_prompt: Julia, a young Roman woman, writing a letter to a friend
anachronisms_in_raw: letter on paper is anachronistic — Romans wrote on wax tablets for correspondence or papyrus sheets
prompts.enhancement_goal: MUST: Julia scratching letters into a small hinged wooden board filled with dark wax using a pointed metal stick — NO pen, NO paper, NO book, NO quill. MUST: wearing a long draped dress in warm earth tones with a shawl. BACKGROUND: small Roman room with stone walls, a single clay oil lamp with flame, rolled papyrus scrolls stacked on wooden shelves, intelligent focused expression

prompts.raw_prompt: Cinematic shot of Julia, an elegant young Roman woman, in ancient Rome
anachronisms_in_raw: no grounding — could render Renaissance or fantasy setting
prompts.enhancement_goal: MUST: Julia wearing a long floor-length saffron-yellow dress — vivid golden-yellow color, this is the most important detail — with a white wool shawl draped over her shoulders. NO purse, NO bag, NO modern accessories. MUST: standing OUTDOORS on stone steps at dusk, dignified intelligent expression, elaborate upswept pinned hairstyle. BACKGROUND: Roman stone building facade behind her, warm golden evening light, open sky visible

prompts.raw_prompt: Marcus, a Roman senator, having a meeting with Gaius, a merchant, in ancient Rome
anachronisms_in_raw: vague setting — no location grounding
social class distinction between senator and freedman merchant not visible in dress or posture
prompts.enhancement_goal: MUST: Two men standing face to face OUTDOORS in a Roman stone plaza — the older man in a white toga with a wide purple border stripe, the younger man in a plain linen tunic with a draped wool cloak. MUST: clear class distinction — the toga-wearing senator stands upright with authority, the merchant is slightly deferential. The merchant holds a small hinged wooden board. BACKGROUND: weathered stone columns of an ancient Roman temple, open sky, stone pavement

prompts.raw_prompt: Gaius, a Roman merchant, making a business deal with a foreign trader
anachronisms_in_raw: handshake rendered as modern grip rather than Roman dextrarum iunctio
no period-specific goods visible
foreign trader has no period-accurate costume
prompts.enhancement_goal: MUST: Two men gripping each other's RIGHT WRISTS — not a handshake, each man grabs the other's forearm just above the wrist, elbows raised to chest height. MUST: Gaius in a plain linen tunic, the foreign trader wearing colorful layered patterned robes and a head wrap. Between them on a wooden table: a rolled papyrus scroll and tall clay storage jars. BACKGROUND: harbor dock, wooden ship masts visible, rope rigging

prompts.raw_prompt: Julia, a young Roman woman, talking with Marcus, an older senator, about philosophy
anachronisms_in_raw: seated in modern chairs rather than Roman benches or garden seats
codex books rather than papyrus scrolls
no Roman architectural context
prompts.enhancement_goal: Julia in stola and palla in Stoic discussion with Senator Marcus in a colonnaded peristyle garden — marble garden benches, open papyrus scrolls, impluvium pool visible, oil lamp, intergenerational respectful dynamic, 110 CE

prompts.raw_prompt: Marcus, a Roman senator, relaxing at the public baths with other men
anachronisms_in_raw: modern bathing suits or towels shown
modern pool tiling rather than Roman hypocaust architecture
no strigils or oil flasks
prompts.enhancement_goal: MUST: Marcus bare-chested sitting at the edge of a large stone pool filled with steaming water — NO modern towels, NO swimwear. MUST: a servant behind him scraping his back with a curved metal blade and pouring oil from a small clay flask. BACKGROUND: grand arched stone ceiling with high windows letting in light, steam rising from the pool, other men bathing in the background, marble columns

prompts.raw_prompt: Gaius, a Roman merchant, at a guild meeting with other businessmen
anachronisms_in_raw: modern conference table
participants in modern business attire
no Roman collegium architectural setting
prompts.enhancement_goal: Gaius at an Ostia collegium meeting in the schola building — freedmen in tunics and pallia seated in a semicircle, wax tablets being passed, collegium standard on wall, statue of Mercury as patron deity, 110 CE

prompts.raw_prompt: Julia, a Roman woman, watching a religious ceremony at a temple
anachronisms_in_raw: Christian-style kneeling or reverence (not Roman practice)
church-like interior architecture
wrong ceremonial dress for Roman religion
prompts.enhancement_goal: MUST: women in ankle-length white robes with white woolen bands woven through their upswept hair, tending a small fire burning on a circular stone altar. MUST: Julia standing to the side with her white palla fabric drawn up over her head in reverence. BACKGROUND: marble temple columns, stone plaza pavement, Forum Romanum crowd in Roman dress

prompts.raw_prompt: Marcus, a Roman senator, greeting visitors at his home in the morning
anachronisms_in_raw: modern front door or entryway
visitors in generic or modern clothing
no impluvium atrium architecture
prompts.enhancement_goal: Marcus in toga praetexta receiving morning salutatio in his Esquiline Hill domus atrium — clientes lined up, impluvium pool under compluvium sky opening, lararium shrine with Lares, mosaic floor, oil lamps, 110 CE

prompts.raw_prompt: Gaius, a Roman merchant, working in his office with his staff
anachronisms_in_raw: modern desk and chairs
paper documents and modern writing instruments
no period-specific Roman commercial workspace
prompts.enhancement_goal: Gaius in his Ostia taberna reviewing a wax tablet manifest — freedmen workers loading amphorae in background, abacus counting board, papyrus records in cubbyhole shelves, harbor visible through open doorway, clay seals and balance weights, 110 CE

prompts.raw_prompt: Julia, a Roman woman, getting ready in her bedroom with her maids
anachronisms_in_raw: wall mirror (Romans only had small hand mirrors of polished bronze)
modern cosmetics containers
modern bedroom furniture
prompts.enhancement_goal: MUST: Julia seated on a backless wooden stool while a maid pins up her hair with long metal hairpins into an elaborate upswept style. MUST: another maid holds a small round polished bronze hand mirror — NOT a wall mirror, a small handheld disc mirror. On a low wooden table beside her: ivory combs and a small stone perfume bottle. BACKGROUND: simple Roman bedroom with stone walls, a low wooden bed frame with cloth, a single clay oil lamp. NO modern furniture, NO modern cosmetics

prompts.raw_prompt: Marcus, a Roman senator, being carried through the streets of Rome in a chair
anachronisms_in_raw: litter may render as wrong-culture palanquin or modern sedan chair
background crowd in modern dress
cobblestone too modern-looking
prompts.enhancement_goal: MUST: Marcus in a white toga with purple border, reclining on cushions inside a covered wooden litter carried on poles by four men in simple tunics — fabric curtains pulled open showing his face. MUST: narrow ancient Roman street with tall stone apartment buildings on both sides, rough stone paving. BACKGROUND: pedestrians in Roman togas and tunics, a small round stone temple visible down the street, warm morning sunlight

prompts.raw_prompt: Gaius, a Roman merchant, arriving at port on a ship
anachronisms_in_raw: modern ship hull design or rigging
modern port infrastructure
wrong sail configuration for a Roman round merchant vessel
prompts.enhancement_goal: MUST: Gaius in a plain linen tunic standing at the front of a wide wooden merchant ship with a single square sail — the ship is broad and rounded, a cargo vessel not a warship. MUST: large clay jars with two handles stacked as cargo on the deck. BACKGROUND: approaching a stone harbor with a squat stone lighthouse, workers on the stone quay waiting, blue Mediterranean sea, clear sky

prompts.raw_prompt: Julia, a Roman woman, walking through ancient Rome with her servants
anachronisms_in_raw: patrician woman walking without proper escort
modern street setting
clothing too casual for a patrician woman outdoors
prompts.enhancement_goal: MUST: Julia in a long draped dress with a shawl pulled modestly over her head, walking OUTDOORS down a narrow ancient Roman street. MUST: a female servant walking behind her and a male guard beside her — NO modern clothing on anyone. NO notepad, NO book, NO pen — her hands are empty or holding the edge of her shawl. BACKGROUND: stone building facades with faded painted plaster walls, rough stone street paving, a small stone water fountain built into a wall, warm morning light
